testcase.name: segmentPairsOf > open subpath: adjacent pairs only
segmentPairsOf > closed subpath: adds the wraparound edge carrying subEnd
segmentPairsOf > two subpaths enumerate independently
planAnchorDelete > plans removal of the nearest anchor within tolerance
planAnchorDelete > returns null when nothing is in range
planAnchorDelete > refuses to shrink a 2-anchor contour
planAnchorConvert > corner anchor converts to smooth
planAnchorConvert > smooth anchor converts to corner
planAnchorAdd > splits an interior straight segment at the click
planAnchorAdd > returns null off-curve
planAnchorAdd > the last subpath's closing edge inserts at subEnd without an override
planAnchorAdd > a non-final subpath's closing edge supplies the starts override
PenMachine — clicks > click places a corner anchor
PenMachine — clicks > Shift+click constrains placement to 45° from the previous anchor
PenMachine — clicks > Enter commits an open path with >= 2 anchors
PenMachine — clicks > Enter with a single anchor cancels instead of committing
PenMachine — clicks > Escape cancels without commit
PenMachine — drags (smooth anchors) > drag creates a smooth anchor with mirrored handles
PenMachine — drags (smooth anchors) > movement under the drag threshold stays a corner
PenMachine — drags (smooth anchors) > Alt during drag freezes the mirrored left handle
PenMachine — drags (smooth anchors) > Shift constrains the handle pull
PenMachine — closing + preview > clicking the first anchor closes the path
PenMachine — closing + preview > hover publishes the rubber band and the close preview
PenMachine — closing + preview > a close-click on the first anchor of a 1-anchor path places a point instead
PenMachine — closing + preview > events after commit are inert
